svg.text: IP Contingency — What We Do Differently
Focus areas, system flow, and why existing tools fall short
Every feature we build serves one of these pillars

g.text: The #1 risk for startups: unclear IP ownership.
We make gaps impossible to ignore.
Track every person who ever touched your IP
Map assignment agreements to assets + people
Priority scoring: current team = HIGH, departed = MEDIUM
One missed deadline = permanent IP loss.
Rules engine: auto-generate deadlines from filings
Daily email digest to responsible parties
Jurisdiction-aware: US, EU, JP rules differ

svg.text: Existing tools either do too much (and cost $$$) or too little (spreadsheets)

g.text: Not a generic tool adapted for IP. Every screen,
every query, every alert is designed for one job:
surface IP ownership gaps and deadline risk.
Competitors are either too broad or too expensive.
Enterprise IPMS takes 6-12 months to deploy.
We're usable from day one. Add your assets,
see gaps immediately. No consultants needed.
Small teams can't wait a year for IP tooling.
Spreadsheets only tell you what you entered.
We actively surface what's missing — gaps you
didn't know about until due diligence hit.
The dashboard shows risk, not just data.

svg.text: The right level of tooling for growing IP portfolios.
Not a spreadsheet. Not a $200K enterprise suite. The tool that actually gets used.
